PFG Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y, Dividend Up (Zacks) — PFG beats Q1 EPS estimates, with profit surging on strong fee income and AUM growth, even as revenues decline year over year.

FAF Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates on Commercial Strength (Zacks) — First American tops Q1 earnings estimates as Title segment strength and higher premiums drive revenue growth, offset partly by rising expenses.
